# CWE-79 positive: UnescapeString reaches text/template without HTML escaping
lang: go
file: CWE-79-taint-vulnerable.go
variant: taint
---
package sample

import (
	"html"
	"net/http"
	"text/template"
)

func RenderPage(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	name := r.URL.Query().Get("name")
	// text/template does not HTML-escape ordinary string values.
	raw := html.UnescapeString(name)
	t := template.Must(template.New("x").Parse("<html>{{.}}</html>"))
	_ = t.Execute(w, raw)
}
